nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McEachin
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Eachainn ‘son of Eachann’, a diminutive of Eachaidh, a personal name based on each ‘horse’ and Anglicized as Hector . See the Irish form McGahan .

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.
